cover: System architecture diagram: 'Salesforce Multi-Cloud Architecture: Sales + Service + Experience + Data 360'. Light grey background with faint grid. Dark bold header block 'Sales + Service + Experience + Data 360'. Subtitle 'Enterprise reference architecture for customer lifecycle, support, portal, analytics, and AI grounding'. Top-right: profile badge 'Bennie Joseph | Architect'. LAYER 1 'Engagement Clouds' pastel blue: modules 'Sales Cloud Opportunities', 'Service Cloud Cases', 'Experience Cloud Portal'. LAYER 2 'Platform Core' pastel purple: modules 'Account Contact Model', 'Entitlements', 'Orders and Assets'. LAYER 3 'Data 360' pastel green: modules 'Identity Resolution', 'Calculated Insights', 'Zero Copy Federation'. Central node 'Customer 360 Profile' with rotating arrow, dotted directional connectors to all layers. INTEGRATION LAYER upper right: 'MuleSoft APIs' and 'Platform Events / CDC'. BOTTOM PANEL 'Governance and AI': sub-modules 'Sharing + Consent', 'Agentforce 2.0', 'Observability' with flow arrows. Rounded rectangle containers, dotted arrowheads, micro vector icons, modern sans-serif fonts, publication-ready engineering diagram.
images: Dark blueprint developer infographic: 'Multi-Cloud Ownership Rules'. Deep dark navy background, glowing neon blue header 'Multi-Cloud Ownership Rules'. Subtitle 'Do not let every cloud own every truth'. TOP ROW: 3 horizontal cards — 'Sales Cloud owns pipeline with Opportunity icon', 'Service Cloud owns support with Case icon', 'Data 360 owns unification with identity graph icon'. MIDDLE: side-by-side — LEFT red-themed box 'BAD: Duplicate Ownership' with red DANGER pill, RIGHT green-themed box 'GOOD: Clear Domain Ownership' with green SUCCESS pill. CENTER: left column red border '// BAD' code: Account.Customer_Score__c = erpScore; Contact.Customer_Score__c = webScore; Case.Customer_Score__c = manualScore; right column green border '// GOOD' code: UnifiedProfile__dlm.Score__c -> Data 360; Account.Support_Tier__c -> CRM; Case.EntitlementId -> Service Cloud. BOTTOM: circular avatar 'Bennie Joseph | Architect' + checklist 'define system of record', 'separate operational vs analytical', 'document activation paths'. Footer bar: 'Architecture fails when ownership is vague'. Monospace font for code, razor-sharp neon text, grid lines.

Dark blueprint developer infographic: 'Salesforce Scale Breakpoints: 1K vs 100K vs 10M'. Deep dark navy background, glowing neon blue header 'Salesforce Scale Breakpoints'. Subtitle 'Multi-cloud design decisions change as volume grows'. TOP ROW: 3 horizontal cards — '1K records: simple sharing with gauge icon', '100K records: async and selective queries with database icon', '10M records: federation and event scale with network icon'. MIDDLE: side-by-side — LEFT red-themed box 'BAD: Query Everything in Portal' with red DANGER pill, RIGHT green-themed box 'GOOD: Selective, Bounded Access' with green SUCCESS pill. CENTER: left column red border '// BAD' code: SELECT Id, Subject, Description FROM Case WHERE AccountId != null ORDER BY CreatedDate DESC; right column green border '// GOOD' code: SELECT Id, CaseNumber, Subject FROM Case WHERE ContactId = :contactId AND Status != 'Closed' WITH USER_MODE LIMIT 50. BOTTOM: circular avatar 'Bennie Joseph | Architect' + checklist 'avoid data skew', 'use events over polling', 'federate high-volume history'. Footer bar: 'Scale exposes every vague architecture decision'. Monospace font for code, razor-sharp neon text, grid lines.
